l10n.text: Adjustable from %s to %s in steps of %s.
How quickly mouse movement translates to steering angle. Low = smooth, high = snappy.
Steering output below this value is clamped to zero. Prevents front wheel jitter.
Mouse movement below this value is ignored. Useful for high-DPI mice.
Top-of-screen bar showing the current steering angle while LMB steering or during the short return-to-centre after you release LMB.

When the ground path lines are visible. Off = never, On steering = whenever the wheels are turned (mouse, keyboard, wheel, controller), Mouse only = during LMB mouse steering and the short coast after release, Always = while in any vehicle.
When on (default), the driving path is hidden while the in-game HUD is hidden (e.g. ` key). The steering bar already follows the HUD in the same way.
Preset colours tuned for the emissive path lines. Cyan is a good pick when green field guidance would blend in.
How far the lines extend at low speed (metres).
How far the lines extend at this vehicle's top speed (metres). Scales linearly with speed in between.
When reversing with a trailer attached, project a yellow line showing where the trailer's rear edges will swing. Uses the trailer's current hitch angle and the vehicle steering arc — updates live.

While holding LMB to steer, yaw the cabin camera slightly with steering so the view follows the bend (like looking through a corner on a bike). Mouse look stays suppressed for LMB-only steering; use RMB+LMB for free-look.

Extra camera yaw at full steering (degrees each side). A natural “in the bend” glance is often ~25–40°. For a proper look at cross traffic (like a shoulder check), try ~70–100°; ~90° is a strong sideways view.
How quickly the camera follows steering and returns when you release. Higher = snappier.
Flip left/right if the camera turns the wrong way for your vehicle or camera mod.
On (default): after LMB release the game centres the wheel — same as keyboard A/D. The mod stops writing axisSteer. Off: the mod drives return itself using the fallback % below.
Only when “Use game steering return” is off: how fast the mod recentres after LMB release. Higher = faster. When that toggle is on, the in-game Options slider applies to both keyboard and mouse.
